##NAMES=Osumilite
##RRUFFID=R060385
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=KFe_2_(Al_5_Si_10_)O_30_
##LOCALITY=Funtanafigu Quarry, Monte Arci, near Oristano, Sardinia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Black tabular distorted hexagonal crystals associated with colorless tridymite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060385
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(K_0.72_Na_0.15_Ca_0.01_)(Fe^2+^_1.07_Mg_0.93_Mn_0.06_)(Al_2.69_Fe^3+^_0.31_)(Si_10.28_Al_1.72_)O_30_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.141 b: 10.141 c: 14.303 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 1273.8 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
